chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-569 of 2013 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 3070/14 2. For Katcha Peshi. 05.03.2018. Mr. Zahoor A. Baloch, Advocate for petitioner. Learned Counsel for the petitioner submits that he has no contact with the petitioner, therefore, does not press this petition, which is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE A.H.
